rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §37.0023, which governs prohibited aversive techniques applied to students by school districts.
quote: A school district or school district employee or volunteer or an independent contractor of a school district may not apply an aversive technique, or by authorization, order, or consent, cause an aversive technique to be applied, to a student.
_note: No overlap between proposed tax policy change and this education discipline statute.
